title: QuickBooks Online Invoice
description: An Invoice represents a sales form where the customer pays for a product or service later. QuickBooks Online records an accounts receivable transaction for each invoice. This schema describes the full Invoice entity as returned by the QuickBooks Online Accounting API.

Id.description: Unique identifier for the invoice, assigned by QuickBooks Online.

SyncToken.description: Version number of the entity used for optimistic concurrency control. Required for update operations. The value changes each time the entity is updated.

DocNumber.description: Reference number for the transaction. If not provided during creation, QuickBooks auto-generates a sequential number.

TxnDate.description: The date of the transaction in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to the current date if not specified.

DueDate.description: The date when payment is due. Calculated based on the sales terms if not explicitly set.

PrivateNote.description: A private note for internal use that is not displayed to the customer.

CustomerMemo.description: A note to the customer that appears on the invoice.

CustomerRef.description: Reference to the customer associated with this invoice. Required for creation.

BillEmail.description: Email address to which the invoice is sent.

Line.description: Individual line items of the transaction. At least one line item with a valid DetailType is required.

TxnTaxDetail.description: Tax details for the entire invoice transaction.

TotalAmt.description: Total amount of the transaction including tax. This is a calculated field and is read-only.

Balance.description: The balance remaining to be paid on the invoice. A value of 0 indicates the invoice is fully paid.

Deposit.description: Deposit amount previously applied to this invoice.

DepositToAccountRef.description: Account where the deposit was made.

SalesTermRef.description: Reference to the sales term (e.g., Net 30, Due on Receipt).

PaymentMethodRef.description: Reference to the payment method for this invoice.

CurrencyRef.description: Reference to the currency used for this invoice. Only applicable for companies with multicurrency enabled.

ExchangeRate.description: The exchange rate between the invoice currency and the home currency. Only applicable for multicurrency companies.

ShipDate.description: Date for delivery of goods or services.

ApplyTaxAfterDiscount.description: If true, tax is calculated after applying any discount. If false, tax is calculated before the discount.

EmailStatus.description: Email delivery status of the invoice.

GlobalTaxCalculation.description: Method in which tax is applied. TaxExcluded means line amounts are exclusive of tax. TaxInclusive means line amounts include tax.

AllowOnlinePayment.description: Whether online payment is allowed for this invoice.

AllowOnlineCreditCardPayment.description: Whether online credit card payment is allowed.

AllowOnlineACHPayment.description: Whether online ACH (bank transfer) payment is allowed.

CustomField.description: Custom fields defined for the invoice. A maximum of 3 custom fields are supported.

LinkedTxn.description: Transactions linked to this invoice such as payments or credit memos.

sparse.description: Indicates whether this is a sparse (partial) representation of the entity.

ReferenceType.description: A reference to another entity in QuickBooks Online, containing the entity ID and optionally a display name.

value.description: The unique identifier of the referenced entity.

name.description: An identifying name for the referenced entity.

Line1.description: First line of the street address.

Line2.description: Second line of the street address.

Line3.description: Third line of the street address.

Line4.description: Fourth line of the street address.

Line5.description: Fifth line of the street address.

CountrySubDivisionCode.description: Region within a country (e.g., state, province).

MetaData.description: Metadata about entity creation and modification timestamps.

CreateTime.description: Timestamp when the entity was created.

LastUpdatedTime.description: Timestamp when the entity was last updated.

LinkedTxn.description: A reference to a linked transaction.

TxnId.description: The ID of the linked transaction.

TxnType.description: The type of the linked transaction.

SalesItemLineDetail.description: Detail for a line item representing a sale of a product or service.

ItemRef.description: Reference to the item (product or service) being sold.

ClassRef.description: Reference to the class for classification.

UnitPrice.description: Per-unit selling price of the item.

RatePercent.description: Discount rate as a percentage (for discount lines).

ItemAccountRef.description: Reference to the account associated with this item.

TaxCodeRef.description: Reference to the tax code for this line.

ServiceDate.description: Date the service was performed or goods delivered.

DiscountAmt.description: Discount amount applied to this line.

InvoiceLine.description: A single line item on an invoice.

Id.description: Unique identifier for the line item.

LineNum.description: Specifies the position of the line in the collection.

Description.description: Free-form text description of the line item.

Amount.description: The total amount for this line item.

DetailType.description: The type of detail for this line.

TxnTaxCodeRef.description: Reference to the tax code for the transaction.

TotalTax.description: Total tax calculated for the transaction.

TaxLine.description: Tax lines itemizing individual tax amounts.

Amount.description: Tax amount for this tax line.

CustomField.description: A custom field defined for the entity.

DefinitionId.description: Unique identifier of the custom field definition.

Type.description: Data type of the custom field.
